# Sandstone Reservoirs

**Summary**: Geological formations composed of sand-sized grains, common in petroleum reservoirs.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[1994-al-fattah|Al-Fattah, 1994]] focused on sandstone reservoirs ranging from semi-consolidated to unconsolidated.
